appDescription.message: End-to-end email encryption using identity-based encryption and Yivi

displayScriptDecryptBar.message: This mail is encrypted using PostGuard.

displayScriptWasEncryptedBar.message: This mail was originally encrypted using PostGuard.

composeBccWarning.message: PostGuard does not support BCC. Either remove BCC or disable PostGuard.

decryptionFailed.message: Decryption failed: the disclosed attributes did not match. Make sure you verify the correct email address in your Yivi app.

recipientUnknown.message: This message was not encrypted for the mail account it was received on.

displayMessageTitle.message: You received a PostGuard encrypted email from

displayMessageHeading.message: You need to prove who you are to decrypt and read this email.

displayMessageQrPrefix.message: Scan the QR code with the Yivi app to disclose your e-mail address.

displayMessageYiviHelpBody.message: The Yivi app is a separate privacy-friendly authentication app (which is used also for other authentication purposes).

displayMessageHeadingSign.message: You need to prove who you are to sign this email.

composeSwitchBarDisabled.message: PostGuard encryption is off. Sensitive content? Turn it on.

networkError.message: Could not connect to PostGuard server. Check your network connection.

startupError.message: PostGuard failed to initialize. Encryption and decryption will not work until the issue is resolved.
